title: ImprovementAction
description: A record of the concrete action taken to apply an approved improvement proposal, including verification outcomes.

proposal_id.description: Identifier of the proposal this action applies.

action_id.description: Unique identifier for this action record.

version.description: Schema version of this action document.

worktree_path.description: Optional filesystem path to the worktree used for applying this action.

changed_files.description: Optional list of file paths that were modified by this action.

verification_commands.description: Optional list of commands run to verify the action was applied correctly.

verification_results.description: Optional list of outcomes for each verification command.

command.description: The verification command that was executed.

status.description: The outcome status of the command (e.g., pass, fail).

regression_detected.description: Whether a regression was detected during verification.

applied_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the action was applied.

verified_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the action was verified.

rollback_reason.description: Optional explanation of why this action was rolled back, if applicable.
